articles.title: US Releases New Footage Of Strikes On Iranian Military Sites Amid Trump Talks Claims
articles.description: Trump recently said the United States had held "very good and productive" discussions with Iranian representatives, though he did not provide details about the talks or identify those involved.

articles.title: Iran Mocks Trump's 'Good & Productive Talks' Claim, Shares Fake WhatsApp Chat
articles.description: Trump announced a five-day pause in military strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure, citing "very good and productive conversations".

articles.title: ‘Hate seeing us WIN…’: Trump accuses ‘Radical Left’ Democrats of undermining ‘great military achievement’ in Iran
articles.description: US President Donald Trump accused Democrats of 'undermining' US' 'great military achievement in Iran'. Earlier today, Iran rejected a US ceasefire offer and laid out its own list of conditions for ending the conflict

articles.title: How Trump May Be Buying Time With "Truce" As US Troops Pour Into Middle East
articles.description: Two Marine units, roughly 5,000 personnel in total, are currently en route, joining more than 50,000 American forces already deployed across the Middle East.

articles.title: 'Sovereignty Over Hormuz': Iran's Fresh Conditions For Truce Amid Trump's Ceasefire Plan
articles.description: Iran has also called for a comprehensive end to hostilities across all fronts, including allied resistance groups in the region.

articles.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
articles.description: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

articles.title: Will end war if conditions met, won't let Trump dictate: Iran rejects US proposal
articles.description: Will end war if conditions met wont let Trump dictate Iran rejects US proposal

articles.title: U.S. and Iran Are Talking About Ways to End the War: What to Know
articles.description: The United States is discussing ways to end hostilities with Iran, even as President Trump continues to threaten attacks and as the Pentagon dispatches more troops.

articles.title: Matt Brittin, Former Google Executive, Named the New BBC Head
articles.description: Matt Brittin, the former president of Google in Europe, will become the new director general. Among the items on his to-do list: handling a lawsuit from President Trump.

articles.title: Iran mocks Trump, rejects points suggested by U.S. for peace talks
articles.description: Iran's state media say the regime has rejected points suggested by the Trump administration as the basis of a potential peace deal.

articles.title: Iraq war veteran calls out Trump's contradictions on Iran war
articles.description: Phil Klay, a  U.S. Marine veteran who fought in Iraq and is an English professor at Fairfield University, weighs in on the U.S. operation against Iran and the contradictions among members of the Trump administration on the conflict's objectives.

articles.title: Trump voted by mail in Florida despite calling mail-in voting "cheating"
articles.description: President Trump has long railed against mail-in voting, but used the method this month in a Florida election, public records indicate.

articles.title: Additional Troops Deployed to Middle East as Trump Claims Victory
articles.description: More than 1,000 additional troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are heading to the Middle East, according to two sources. The announcement came as President Donald Trump in the Oval Office Tuesday said, “We’ve won this, this war has been won.” NBC's Richard Engel reports for TODAY on the war in Iran.

articles.title: DOJ disclosed 'damning evidence' that Trump procured classified documents, top Democrat says
articles.description: The Justice Department released documents to Congress that included "damning evidence" about President Donald Trump's procurement of highly sensitive documents, including some related to his business interests, when he left office after his first term, Rep.

articles.title: Machado tells US oil giants Venezuela will become beacon of wealth creation after Trump ousted Maduro
articles.description: María Corina Machado is pitching Venezuela as a top U.S. oil partner after she said the Trump administration’s arrest of former dictator Nicolás Maduro opened up a “new era."

articles.title: Soros-backed DA Krasner threatens ICE agents at Philly airport: ‘I will put you in handcuffs’
articles.description: Philadelphia DA Lawrence Krasner threatens to arrest ICE agents at airports, warning Trump officials: 'I will put you in handcuffs' if laws are broken.

articles.title: Democrats seize on Trump-district flip as midterm signal — Republicans reject the narrative
articles.description: Democrat Emily Gregory flipped a GOP seat in Trump's Mar-a-Lago district, prompting DNC Chair Ken Martin to claim Democrats can now win anywhere.

articles.title: Kamala Harris' media project goes after Jake Tapper: 'Cosplaying' Gen Z creators with podcast mic stunt
articles.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris' Headquarters accuses Jake Tapper of cosplaying Gen Z content creators, saying a podcast mic won't make CNN relevant again.

articles.title: Iran rejects U.S. ceasefire offer, demands sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

articles.title: Trump says he could send National Guard to airports 'for more help'
articles.description: President Donald Trump says he is considering sending the National Guard to airports where  TSA officer absences have led to long lines.

articles.title: U.S. brought back $100 million of gold from Venezuela, Interior Secretary Burgum says
articles.description: The Interior secretary said Venezuela's interim president, Delcy Rodriguez, wants foreign investment in the country's mining sector.

articles.title: Trump administration waives summer gasoline regulations to address surging fuel prices
articles.description: EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin said the waivers will help prevent a fuel supply disruption in the U.S. during the Iran war.

articles.title: Former SEC Chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post
articles.description: "Any move like that in advance of any announcement, the regulators are going to look at," said Clayton, former SEC chair.

articles.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
articles.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.
